title: veronica teucrium var. minor
intro: Veronica teucrium var. minor, also known as the small wall penny-cress or small wall tea, is a plant species that belongs to the Veronica family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is also used to treat various health conditions such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Veronica teucrium var. minor include its ability to soothe coughs and colds, reduce inflammation, and promote digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy. This plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
